message.content:
Here is the summary of the content you provided:

- Core idea: A loop policy consisting of detection and containment rules for three repeat/ stall scenarios:
  - Repeated user intent
  - Repeated assistant output
  - Stalled tool execution
  - Recursive repair attempts

- Required behavior when any of these are detected:
  - Preserve user control
  - Stop after a bounded number of retries (i.e., do not loop indefinitely)
  - Provide a concise summary of the repeated state to the user
  - Ask for one concrete next action from the user before continuing

- Note: The policy appears 240 times in your list, but all sections convey the same rules and behavior. Functionally, it’s one policy framework being reiterated.
